name: Water Heater Calculator
seo_description: Electric Water Heater Calculator. Tank capacity, Inlet temperature (°C), Outlet temperature (°C) — get Required power, Energy per cycle, Monthly.

range_hints.temp_entrada_c: Temperatura of the water of red (varía per estación)
range_hints.temp_salida_c: Temperatura of uso: 45-50°C ducha, 60°C for legionela
range_hints.horas_calentamiento: Tiempo deseado for calentar el tank completo

result_context: To calentar {litros_deposito}L of {temp_entrada_c}°C a {temp_salida_c}°C in {horas_calentamiento}h se needs power of {potencia_kw} kW ({potencia_w} W). energy requerida: {energia_kwh} kWh.
formula_display: Î”T = T_salida - T_entrada; energy = liters × Î”T × 0.00116; power = energy ÷ hours
mistakes: No programar temperature mínima of 60°C to evitar legionela
Dimensionar power insuficiente (time of recuperación muy largo)
No Consider rate electrical to programar calentamiento in hours valle
